rationale.R1.5: The draft narrates pipeline stages as an undifferentiated prose block; reorganizing into clearly delimited stages with crisp transitions is a central expected part of any meaningful improvement to a methods draft.
rationale.R1.6: The text is the primary site of failure: pervasive redundancy ('that we developed for analyzing … that we obtained from … that participated in'), multi-clause run-on sentences, unnecessary passive stacking, and filler throat-clearing. Writing polish is the load-bearing responsibility unambiguously implied by 'improve this draft.'
